{{Quote|Didn't we save your papa's ''shebs'' at Caluula Station? Ask him if he remembers the funny folks in armor who were killing the ''vongese'' for him. It might jog his memory. And tell him Carid sends his best.|[[Baltan Carid]], speaking to [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]]|<ref name="Legacy of the Force: Revelation">''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]''</ref>}}
The '''Battle of Caluula''' lasted for a month in [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]] near the end of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] between a joint [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]]/[[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] force and the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

==Battle==
===Buildup===
[[Caluula/Legends|Caluula]] had been identified as an entry point to the [[Tion Hegemony/Legends|Tion Hegemony]] by [[Warmaster]] [[Nas Choka]], and [[Galactic Alliance Intelligence Service|Galactic Alliance Intelligence]] also speculated that Caluula and [[Toong'l/Legends|Toong'l]] were possible fallback points for an attack on [[Dac/Legends|Mon Calamari]]. The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] had a meager defense force, mostly on or around an [[Caluula Station|orbital spacestation]]. With the [[HoloNet/Legends|HoloNet]] down, Caluula's survival depended on Caluula Station.

===The battle===
[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]] had arrived from the [[Battle of Selvaris]] with rescued prisoners who had been intended for a sacrifice on [[Coruscant/Legends#Yuuzhan'tar|Yuuzhan'tar]]. On learning of the decreased numbers, and of Caluula's future importance, [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra]] ordered a renewed attack on the besieged Caluula Station.

A [[ychna]] led the attack on the station, carrying [[Warrior caste|warriors]] who boarded it. However, the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] and the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] hadn't been the only ones who recognized Caluula's importance: [[Mandalore (title)/Legends|Mandalore]] [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] had sent a team to review it, and brought in a small force of [[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|Mandalorian Protectors]]. Upon seeing the Mandalorians' fighting abilities, the Yuuzhan Vong warriors were whipped into a frenzy as they attempted to capture the Mandalorians for the upcoming sacrifice, to the point that some fought among themselves for the opportunity to engage the Mandalorians in combat. However, Fett and his team were able to buy enough time for most of Caluula Station's forces—as well as the Solos—to head planetside or escape into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]]. Caluula Station exploded shortly after the last forces escaped.

===Aftermath===
{{Main|Mission to Caluula}}
With Caluula Orbital destroyed, the [[Governor of Caluula]] sent a message to the Yuuzhan Vong suing for peace. In it, the Governor requested that the inhabitants not be implanted with [[Yorik-Kul|surge-coral]], and be allowed to live in peace with the Yuuzhan Vong. She also made one additional request: To allow a scientific team to observe the [[Nocturne of the Winged-Stars]], which was occurring that year. In the efforts of rapid [[yammosk]] implantation, [[Supreme Commander (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|Supreme Commander]] [[Malik Carr]] agreed to the request initially, though stating that the final decision on the petition lay with [[High Prefect]] [[Drathul]]. The [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] however, covertly intended to [[Mission to Caluula|use]] the team to eliminate the yammosk based on the planet—as well as to secretly monitor the effects of the recently released [[Alpha Red (pathogen)|Alpha Red]] bioweapon.
